center.name: Douro DOC
center.summary: Douro DOC是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联1种鸟类，包括Iberian chiffchaff，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: In Portugal it is mainly found in Trás-os-Montes and Alto Douro in the north with another separate population in southern Portugal from Estremadura south to the Algarve. It also breeds in northern Morocco. It is found in humid areas, being assocuiated with riparian habitats in the south, although in the north they are found in a deciduous woodland with well-developed undergrowth and are less dependant on riparian habitats
